issues.what: The new flow orders: adjudicator -> verdict.ts recomputes warna (6.1) -> registerGuard pass 2 (may DROP a temuan that violates register and fails its corrective retry) -> persist. In that double-failure edge the persisted warna was derived from a temuan set that then shrank, so the stored verdict can violate 6.1 lines 207-209 (e.g. warna merah with zero remaining merah temuan, or kuning/merah with no temuan carrying pertanyaan_rat).
issues.fix: Reorder so the 6.1 recompute runs on the FINAL post-drop temuan set (adjudicator -> guard pass 2 with drops -> verdict.ts recompute -> persist), or state that verdict.ts re-derives after any pass-2 drop. One-sentence edit in sec 3; sec 4 line 134 ('setelah adjudikator, sebelum persist') already permits this order.
